KPR Institute of Engineering & Technology (KPRIET) was established by the KPR Group in Coimbatore with the goal of offering high-quality engineering education in a tech-driven environment. It is affiliated to Anna University and approved by AICTE. Known for its industry-aligned curriculum, research initiatives, and state-of-the-art infrastructure, the institute has quickly become one of Tamil Nadu’s top private engineering colleges

# Kpr Institute Of Engineering And Technology (KPRIET) Coimbatore
### Description
KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology (KPRIET) is in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. It was established in 2009 by KPR Charities. The institute occupies 66 acres. KPRIET is an autonomous and unaided private institute. It is affiliated with Anna University, Chennai.

KPRIET offers 8 undergraduate programs, 4 postgraduate programs and 6 PhD programs. The institute has 12 academic departments with research centers in different engineering and pure science fields. It employs 260 faculty members and has around 3,500 students. There are also 280 administrative and support staff.

Facilities at KPRIET include smart classrooms, modern laboratories, high-speed wireless internet, auditoriums and seminar halls. The institute features a large centralized library, sports facilities and a gym.

Institute accepts TNEA scores for BE/BTech admissions and CEETA PG scores for MTech. KPRIET is approved by AICTE and accredited by NAAC with "A" grade. The courses also have NBA approval.

In 2023, KPRIET ranked 101 among 200 engineering colleges and 151 overall in India according to NIRF.

Placements- Over 450 students have secured placements in multinational companies. The highest CTC was Rs 20 LPA while the average CTC offered was Rs 4.2 LPA.
